pair.no_reply: No reply from the robot. Check the IP, and wake it in the Xiaomi app.

settings.history_intro: Every state change of the robot. "flow" = triggered by a Homey action; "external" = robot button, Xiaomi app or schedule (Homey cannot tell these apart, it only sees the result at the next poll).
settings.log_intro: Raw values, to analyse a mid-clean recharge. Run a full clean, then export and share the CSV.
